assertion_results.text: Each task file contains all required template sections: Repository, Target Branch, Description, at least one of Files to Modify or Files to Create, Implementation Notes, Acceptance Criteria, Test Requirements
assertion_results.evidence: All 5 task files contain every required section. Task 1: Repository (line 1), Target Branch (line 4), Description (line 7), Files to Create + Files to Modify (lines 11-14), Implementation Notes (lines 19-38), Acceptance Criteria (lines 45-49), Test Requirements (lines 51-53). Task 2: Repository (line 1), Target Branch (line 4), Description (line 7), Files to Modify (line 11), Implementation Notes (lines 14-27), Acceptance Criteria (lines 37-41), Test Requirements (lines 43-46). Task 3: Repository (line 1), Target Branch (line 4), Description (line 7), Files to Create + Files to Modify (lines 11-14), Implementation Notes (lines 19-35), Acceptance Criteria (lines 43-48), Test Requirements (lines 50-53). Task 4: Repository (line 1), Target Branch (line 4), Description (line 7), Files to Modify (line 11), Implementation Notes (lines 14-24), Acceptance Criteria (lines 31-34), Test Requirements (lines 36-38). Task 5: Repository (line 1), Target Branch (line 4), Description (line 7), Files to Modify (lines 11-13), Implementation Notes (lines 19-39), Acceptance Criteria (lines 47-54), Test Requirements (lines 56-61).

assertion_results.text: Task count is between 3 and 10 inclusive
assertion_results.evidence: There are exactly 5 task files in the outputs directory: task-1-severity-summary-model.md, task-2-aggregation-service.md, task-3-endpoint-handler.md, task-4-cache-invalidation.md, task-5-threshold-filter.md. 5 is between 3 and 10 inclusive.

Every task file's Repository section contains exactly 'trustify-backend': Task 1 line 2: 'trustify-backend', Task 2 line 2: 'trustify-backend', Task 3 line 2: 'trustify-backend', Task 4 line 2: 'trustify-backend', Task 5 line 2: 'trustify-backend'.

assertion_results.text: Task dependencies form a DAG with no circular dependencies
assertion_results.evidence: Dependencies extracted from task files: Task 1 has no dependencies. Task 2 depends on Task 1 (line 49: 'Depends on: Task 1'). Task 3 depends on Task 2 (line 59: 'Depends on: Task 2'). Task 4 depends on Task 3 (line 41: 'Depends on: Task 3'). Task 5 depends on Task 3 (line 68: 'Depends on: Task 3'). This forms a tree/DAG: 1 -> 2 -> 3 -> {4, 5}. No circular dependencies exist.

assertion_results.text: Every task's Files to Modify and Files to Create reference paths plausible within the repo-backend.md structure
assertion_results.evidence: Task 1: Files to Create 'modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/advisory_summary.rs' is a new file in the existing modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/ directory; Files to Modify 'modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/mod.rs' exists in the repo structure. Task 2: Files to Modify 'modules/fundamental/src/sbom/service/sbom.rs' exists. Task 3: Files to Create 'modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/advisory_summary.rs' is a new file in the existing modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/ directory; Files to Modify 'modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/mod.rs' exists. Task 4: Files to Modify 'modules/ingestor/src/graph/advisory/mod.rs' exists. Task 5: Files to Modify 'modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/advisory_summary.rs' (created by Task 3), 'modules/fundamental/src/sbom/service/sbom.rs' (exists), 'modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/advisory_summary.rs' (created by Task 1). All paths are within existing directories of the repo-backend.md structure.

assertion_results.text: Impact map lists concrete, specific changes (not vague or abstract descriptions)
assertion_results.evidence: The impact-map.md lists 8 specific, concrete changes: 'Add AdvisorySeveritySummary response model struct to the SBOM model module', 'Add severity aggregation query method to SbomService that counts advisories by severity using the sbom_advisory join table', 'Add GET /api/v2/sbom/{id}/advisory-summary endpoint handler with 404 handling for missing SBOMs', 'Register the new endpoint route in the SBOM endpoints module', 'Add 5-minute cache configuration to the new endpoint route', 'Add cache invalidation call in the advisory ingestion pipeline when new advisories are linked to an SBOM', 'Add optional ?threshold query parameter support to filter severity counts', 'Add integration tests for the new endpoint covering success, 404, caching, and threshold filtering scenarios'. Each specifies exact components, APIs, modules, or behavior.

assertion_results.text: Every generated task description contains a Repository section with a single repository name (not multiple repos per task)
assertion_results.evidence: All 5 task files contain '## Repository' followed by a single line 'trustify-backend'. No task contains multiple repository names. Verified in task-1 (lines 1-2), task-2 (lines 1-2), task-3 (lines 1-2), task-4 (lines 1-2), task-5 (lines 1-2).
